zh.lifeSummary: Mortagh o'brien於大約1150年出生。他於1175年之前與Mrs Mortagh O'brien在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mortagh o'brien于大约1150年出生。他于1175年之前与Mrs Mortagh O'brien在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: o'brien
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Dermot, Liam, Brigid, Declan, Donovan, John Patrick, Kieran, Colm, Donal, Brennan, Caitlin.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Briain ‘descendant of Brian’, a personal name probably based on the element bre- ‘hill’, with the transferred sense ‘eminence’, i.e. ‘exalted one’. See also Bryan . In Ireland there has also been some confusion with O'Byrne (see Byrne ).
History: This name is borne in particular by one of the greatest of Irish septs, descendants of Brian Boru, who rose to the high kingship of Ireland in 1002.

variants.name: O'Brion
meanings: Irish: variant of   O'Brien  .

variants.name: O'Bryon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish William Kevin.
Irish: variant of   O'Brien  .

variants.name: Bryan
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Bryant  .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Briain, see O'Brien .

variants.name: O'Briant
meanings: Irish: variant of O'Brien , with excrescent -t.

variants.name: O'Bryant
meanings: Irish: variant of   O'Brien  .

variants.name: McBrien
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Seamus.
Irish:
Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Briain ‘son of Brian’. See O'Brien and Bryan .

variants.name: O'Brian
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Liam.
Irish: variant of   O'Brien  .

variants.name: O'Bryan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish James Patrick, Padraic.
Irish: variant of   O'Brien  .

nameMeanings.name: Mortagh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Ciaran, Declan, Eamon, Eamonn, Fintan, Maeve.
Irish:

midland Anglicized form of Ó Muircheartaigh ‘descendant of Muircheartach’ a personal name meaning ‘navigator’; compare Moriarty in Munster. See also Scottish Murdoch . Variants with a final -ie or -y may also be shortened forms of McMurdie etc., from the same personal name.

variants.name: Moriarty
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Seamus, Aidan, Bridie, Caitlin, Dermot, Fergus, Paddy.

Irish (Kerry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muircheartaigh ‘descendant of Muircheartach’, a personal name from muir ‘sea’ + ceardach ‘skilled’, i.e. ‘skilled navigator’. A Meath and Monaghan name of the same form in Irish is Anglicized as Murtagh , comparable to Scottish Murdoch . It may also be a shortened form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh ‘son of Muircheartach’, see McMurdie .

variants.name: Murtaugh
meanings: Irish: variant of   Murtagh  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Murtha
meanings: New Testament name, of Aramaic rather than Hebrew origin, meaning ‘lady’. It was borne by the sister of Lazarus and Mary of Bethany (John 11:1). According to Luke 10:38, when Jesus visited the house of Mary and Martha, Mary sat at his feet, listening to him, while Martha ‘was cumbered about much serving’, so that she complained to Jesus, ‘Lord, dost thou not care that my sister hath left me to serve alone?’ For this reason, the name Martha has always been associated with hard domestic work, as opposed to the contemplative life.

en.lifeSummary: Mortagh o'brien was born about 1150. He married Mrs Mortagh O'brien before 1175, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Mortagh o'brien est né environ 1150. Il a épousé Mrs Mortagh O'brien avant 1175, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Mortagh o'brien wurde um 1150 geboren. Er hat vor 1175 in Europa Mrs Mortagh O'brien geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Mortagh o'brien è nato il circa 1150. Lui sposato Mrs Mortagh O'brien prima del 1175, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Mortagh o'brienは約1150年に生まれた。1175年以前にヨーロッパでMrs Mortagh O'brienと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mortagh o'brien(은)는 대략 1150년 태어났다. 그는 1175년 이전 우럽에서 Mrs Mortagh O'brien(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mortagh o'brien nasceu aproximadamente 1150. Ele casou-se com Mrs Mortagh O'brien antes 1175, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Mortagh o'brien родился около 1150 г. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Mortagh O'brien перед 1175 г. в местности Европа. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Mortagh o'brien nació aproximadamente 1150. Se casó con Mrs Mortagh O'brien antes de 1175, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
